meaning: n.痕迹,踪迹,微量,迹线,缰绳vt.描绘,映描,画轮廓,追踪,回溯,探索vi.上溯,沿路走
examples: How far back can you trace your family tree?
The trace showed a normal heart rhythm.
They believe millions of them are passing through us every second without a trace.
Their owners are keen to trace them and are focusing the search near Cardiff airport after sightings.
